title: Posture Compass 5-axis instrument; framing_tensions/rival_framing columns
public_claim: Red Team Phase II posture packet is a handoff centered on a five-axis Posture Compass and framing-tension fields.
distinctive_mechanism: It preserves the seven-section foundation layout and adds framing_tensions, rival_framing, and posture-compass fields so red-team review can track rival interpretations and posture shifts explicitly.
